mod.name: Rush Event
mod.author: VirrageS
mod.config:
configRushEvent = { storages = { main = '854774', -- set free storage player = '854773', -- set free storage joining = '854772', -- set free storage b_score = '854771', -- set free storage r_score = '854770', -- set free storage exhaust = '854775', countEvent = '854776' },
position = { blue = {x=4165, y=2271, z=6}, -- posiotion to which player is teleporting red = {x=4150, y=2325, z=6} -- posiotion to which player is teleporting },
room = { from = {x=4116,y=2255,z=6}, -- left top corner of event room to = {x=4227,y=2354,z=7} -- right bottom corner of event room },
rewards = {6527}, -- reward id which player can win (reward is random) players = { max = 20, min = 5, minLevel = 100 },
days = { ['Monday'] = {'02:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'06:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'10:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'14:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'18:00:00'}, ['Monday'] = {'23:00:00'},
['Tuesday'] = {'02:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'06:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'10:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'14:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'18:00:00'}, ['Tuesday'] = {'23:00:00'},
['Wednesday'] = {'02:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'06:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'10:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'14:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'18:00:00'}, ['Wednesday'] = {'23:00:00'},
['Thursday'] = {'02:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'06:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'10:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'14:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'18:00:00'}, ['Thursday'] = {'23:00:00'},
['Friday'] = {'02:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'06:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'10:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'14:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'18:00:00'}, ['Friday'] = {'23:00:00'},
['Saturday'] = {'02:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'06:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'10:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'14:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'18:00:00'}, ['Saturday'] = {'23:00:00'},
['Sunday'] = {'02:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'06:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'10:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'14:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'18:00:00'}, ['Sunday'] = {'23:00:00'} },
fragLimit = 40, -- frag limit
waitTime = 20, -- sekundy [ile gracz ma czekac jak padnie]
delayTime = 5.0, -- time in which players who joined to event are teleporting to teleport position [miuntes] startEvent = 1, -- time from teleport to start event [seconds] stopEvent = 1800, -- [seconds] text = 'O time que completar 40 Frags sera o vencedor !.' }
mod.lib:
domodlib('config_rush_event')
local conditionBlue = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionBlue, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionBlue, {lookType = 130, lookHead = 87, lookBody = 87, lookLegs = 87, lookFeet = 87, lookAddons = 3})
local conditionRed = createConditionObject(CONDITION_OUTFIT) setConditionParam(conditionRed, CONDITION_PARAM_TICKS, -1) addOutfitCondition(conditionRed, {lookType = 128, lookHead = 94, lookBody = 94, lookLegs = 94, lookFeet = 94, lookAddons = 3})
function doStartRushEvent() doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.joining, -1)
if configRushEvent.players.min <= doCountPlayersRushEvent()[1] then for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do local p = tostring(getCreatureStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) if p ~= '' then doTeleportThing(cid, p ~= 'blue' and configRushEvent.position.red or configRushEvent.position.blue) doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) -- doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) doAddCondition(cid, p ~= 'blue' and conditionRed or conditionBlue) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'Prepare-se. Evento Rush começa em '..configRushEvent.startEvent..' segundos.') end end
addEvent(doSetStorage, configRushEvent.startEvent * 1000, configRushEvent.storages.main, 1) addEvent(doStopRushEvent, configRushEvent.stopEvent * 1000) doBroadcastMessage('O Rush Event foi iniciado. VAMOS!') else for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if tostring(getCreatureStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) ~= '' then doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) -- doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player, '') doTeleportThing(cid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(cid)), true) end end
doBroadcastMessage('[Rush Event]

Evento não foi iniciado por falta de Players!', MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR) end end
function doCreateRush() doCreateNpc("Rush War", {x = 162, y = 54, z = 7})
return true end
function doCreateRush2() doCreateNpc("Rush War", {x = 147, y = 52, z = 7})
return true end
local cfg = { time = configRushEvent.delayTime*60, cor = TEXTCOLOR_RED, to = {x = 0, y = 0, z = 0}, pos = {x = 166, y = 53, z = 7} }
function deleteTeleport() local teleport = getTileItemById(cfg.pos, 1387).uid if(teleport > 0) then doRemoveItem(teleport) doSendMagicEffect(cfg.pos, CONST_ME_POFF) doSendAnimatedText(cfg.pos, "Closed", TEXTCOLOR_RED)
end return false end
function doCreateTeleportRush() if countDown(cfg.pos, cfg.time, cfg.cor) then local teleport1 = doCreateTeleport(1387, cfg.to, cfg.pos) doItemSetAttribute(teleport1, "uid", 51201) doSendMagicEffect(cfg.pos, CONST_ME_ENERGYAREA) addEvent(deleteTeleport, cfg.time * 1000) -- addEvent(doRemoveNPC, cfg.time * 1000) -- addEvent(doRemoveNPC2, cfg.time * 1000) -- doRemoveNPC() end return false end function doStopRushEvent() if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.main) > 0 then local team = nil if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score) == configRushEvent.fragLimit then team = 'blue' elseif getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score) == configRushEvent.fragLimit then team = 'red' else if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score) >= getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score) then team = 'red' else team = 'blue' end end
local prize = math.random(#configRushEvent.rewards) for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if isInRange(getThingPos(cid), configRushEvent.room.from, configRushEvent.room.to) then if team == tostring(getCreatureStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) then doPlayerAddItem(cid, configRushEvent.rewards[prize], 10) doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'Seu time venceu! Você recebeu '.. getItemNameById(configRushEvent.rewards[prize]) ..'') end
doCreatureAddHealth(cid, getCreatureMaxHealth(cid) - getCreatureHealth(cid)) doCreatureAddMana(cid, getCreatureMaxMana(cid) - getCreatureMana(cid)) doTeleportThing(cid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(cid))) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player, '') doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) -- doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) end end
doBroadcastMessage('Rush Event terminou. O vencedor é '..team..' TEAM ('..getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score)..':'..getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score)..'). Parabéns!') db.query("INSERT INTO `events` (`event_name`, `winner_name`, `won_item`, `time_win`) VALUES ("Rush", ""..team.."", ""..prize.."", "..getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.countEvent)..");") doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.main, -1) doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.countEvent, getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.countEvent) + 1) doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score, 0) doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score, 0) -- doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_INFIGHT) end end
function doCountPlayersRushEvent() local x, blue, red = 0,0,0 for _, cid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do local p = tostring(getCreatureStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) if p ~= '' then if p ~= 'blue' then red = red + 1 else blue = blue + 1 end x = x + 1 end end return {x, blue, red} end
function doRemoveNpcByWes() local from = {x = 103, y = 22, z = 7} local to = {x = 213, y = 93, z = 7} local monster = "Rush War" for x = from.x, to.x do for y = from.y, to.y do for z = from.z, to.z do pos = {x = x, y = y, z = z, stackpos = 253} v = getThingfromPos(pos).uid if isNpc(v) and getCreatureName(v):lower() == monster:lower() then doRemoveCreature(v) end end end end return true end
function doStartCountingRushEvent() if configRushEvent.delayTime > 0 then doCreateTeleportRush() doCreateRush() doCreateRush2()
doBroadcastMessage("[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 5 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 60000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 4 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 120000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 3 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 180000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 2 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 240000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 1 minuto

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") addEvent(doStartRushEvent, 300000) addEvent(doRemoveNpcByWes, 300000)
-- doBroadcastMessage("[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 5 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") -- addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 5000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 4 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") -- addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 10000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 3 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") -- addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 15000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 2 minutos

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") -- addEvent(doBroadcastMessage, 20000, "[Rush War]

O Rush War evento vai começar em 1 minuto

 Premio de 10 Event Coins.") -- addEvent(doStartRushEvent, 25000) -- addEvent(doRemoveNpcByWes, 25000) end end
mod.talkaction:
domodlib("lib_rush_event")
function onSay(cid, words, param) if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.main) < 1 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você não pode fazer isso se o Rush Event não estiver ativado.') end
doStopRushEvent() return true end

domodlib("lib_rush_event")
function onSay(cid, words, param) if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.main) > 0 then return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Evento Rush já está sendo executado.') end
for _, pid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if tostring(getCreatureStorage(pid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) ~= '' then doCreatureSetStorage(pid, configRushEvent.storages.player, '') doTeleportThing(pid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(pid)), true) doRemoveCondition(pid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) end end
doStartCountingRushEvent(0) doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.joining, 1) addEvent(doStartRushEvent, configRushEvent.delayTime * 60 * 1000) return true end
mod.movement:
domodlib("lib_rush_event")
function onStepIn(cid, item, position, fromPosition) if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.joining) ~= 1 then doTeleportThing(cid, fromPosition, true) return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Volte quando o evento começar.') elseif getPlayerLevel(cid) < configRushEvent.players.minLevel then doTeleportThing(cid, fromPosition, true) return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Voce nao tem '..configRushEvent.players.minLevel..' level.') elseif exhaustion.check(cid, configRushEvent.storages.exhaust) ~= false then doTeleportThing(cid, fromPosition, true) return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Você deve esperar '..exhaustion.get(cid, configRushEvent.storages.exhaust)..' segundos para entrar.') end if doCountPlayersRushEvent()[1] == configRushEvent.players.max then doTeleportThing(cid, fromPosition, true) return doPlayerSendCancel(cid, 'Evento Lotado.') end doTeleportThing(cid, {x = 4037, y = 2243, z = 7}) doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, false) if configRushEvent.text ~= '' then doPlayerPopupFYI(cid, configRushEvent.text) doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player, doCountPlayersRushEvent()[3] >= doCountPlayersRushEvent()[2] and 'blue' or 'red') doPlayerSendTextMessage(cid, MESSAGE_EVENT_ADVANCE, 'Voce se juntou ao Rush Event. Aguarde pacientemente o inicio.') end
exhaustion.set(cid, configRushEvent.storages.exhaust, 5) return true end
mod.globalevent:
domodlib("lib_rush_event")
local daysOpen = {} for k, v in pairs(configRushEvent.days) do table.insert(daysOpen, k) end
function onThink(cid, interval) if isInArray(daysOpen, os.date('%A')) then if isInArray(configRushEvent.days[os.date('%A')], os.date('%X', os.time())) then if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.joining) ~= 1 then doStartCountingRushEvent(0)
for _, pid in ipairs(getPlayersOnline()) do if tostring(getCreatureStorage(pid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) ~= '' then doCreatureSetStorage(pid, configRushEvent.storages.player, '') doTeleportThing(pid, getTownTemplePosition(getPlayerTown(pid)), true) doRemoveCondition(pid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) end end
doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.joining, 1) addEvent(doStartRushEvent, configRushEvent.delayTime * 60 * 1000) end end end
return true end
mod.event:
domodlib("lib_rush_event")
function onStatsChange(cid, attacker, type, combat, value) if type == 1 and getCreatureHealth(cid) <= value then if isInRange(getThingPos(cid), configRushEvent.room.from, configRushEvent.room.to) then if isPlayer(cid) then local p = tostring(getCreatureStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) doCreatureAddHealth(cid, getCreatureMaxHealth(cid) - getCreatureHealth(cid)) doCreatureAddMana(cid, getCreatureMaxMana(cid) - getCreatureMana(cid)) doTeleportThing(cid, p ~= 'blue' and configRushEvent.position.red or configRushEvent.position.blue) doCreatureSetNoMove(cid, true) addEvent(doCreatureSetNoMove, configRushEvent.waitTime * 1000, cid, false)
if p ~= 'blue' then doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score, math.max(getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score), 0) + 1) if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score) == configRushEvent.fragLimit then doStopRushEvent() end else doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score, math.max(getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score), 0) + 1) if getStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score) == configRushEvent.fragLimit then doStopRushEvent() end end return false end end elseif isInArray({1,3}, type) and isPlayer(attacker) and isPlayer(cid) then if isInRange(getThingPos(cid), configRushEvent.room.from, configRushEvent.room.to) then if tostring(getCreatureStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) == tostring(getCreatureStorage(attacker, configRushEvent.storages.player)) then return false end end end return true end

domodlib("config_rush_event")
function onLogin(cid) if tostring(getCreatureStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player)) ~= '' then doCreatureSetStorage(cid, configRushEvent.storages.player, '') doRemoveCondition(cid, CONDITION_OUTFIT) end
registerCreatureEvent(cid, 'Rush_Event_Dead') return true end
mod.globalevent:
domodlib("config_rush_event")
function onStartup() doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.main, -1) doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.r_score, 0) doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.b_score, 0) doSetStorage(configRushEvent.storages.joining, -1) return true end
